meta.description: On-demand awareness QUIZ + Spot-the-phish pack (participant + facilitator answer key) as a PDF saved to /reports/awareness/quiz. Trigger via /quiz <topic> or manually.

parameters.formDescription: Pick a topic and options, then submit. Leave blank to use the default.

values.placeholder: Used if set / if Topic = Custom

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 2200 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a security-awareness trainer. For the given topic produce a SINGLE valid JSON object for a short awareness QUIZ plus a 'Spot the phish' exercise, for general non-technical staff. Keys: topic; intro (one sentence); questions (6-8 items, each {q, options (array of exactly 4 short strings), answer (0-based index of the correct option), why (one-sentence explanation)}); spotThePhish {scenario (one sentence), email {from, subject, lines (array of 3-5 short body lines)}, redFlags (3-5 short strings naming the give-aways in THIS email), verdict (one sentence)}; takeaways (3-4 short 'lessons learned' one-liners summarising what the learner should remember). Engaging, plain language. Tailor the language, examples and difficulty to the stated Audience and Tone, and honour any stated number of questions, difficulty, duration, seniority or number of tips. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Create an awareness quiz and spot-the-phish exercise for the topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + '. Tone: ' + ($json.tone||'Friendly') + ($json.questions?('. Number of questions: '+$json.questions):'') + ($json.difficulty?('. Difficulty: '+$json.difficulty):'') + ($json.duration?('. Duration: '+$json.duration):'') + ($json.level?('. Audience seniority: '+$json.level):'') + ($json.numTips?('. Number of tips: '+$json.numTips):'')) }} } ]
}
